items.name: constraints
items.doc: Ratio-space min/max constraints for panel sizing.

items.name: dsl_v2
items.doc: DSL v2 parser with named slot declarations.

items.name: parser
items.doc: DSL v1 parser that converts layout strings into a `PanelNode` tree.

items.name: ratio_solver
items.doc: Bi-directional ratio solver for interactive panel resizing.

items.name: solver
items.doc: Flattens a `PanelNode` tree into positioned `SolvedItem` rectangles.

items.name: build
items.signature: pub fn build(dsl: &str, win_w: f32, win_h: f32) -> Vec<SolvedItem>
items.doc:
Parse a DSL string and solve layout for given window dimensions.
Returns a flat Vec<SolvedItem> ready to push to Slint as [PanelItem].

items.name: build_v2
items.doc:
Parse a DSL v2 named-slot string into resizable Panels.
Use `drag()` on the returned panels to apply interactive resize.
